result.stdout:
Usage: lunet [options] <command>
  -h, --help                 Show this message and exit
  -v, --version              Show the version of this command
  -d, --define=VALUE         Defines a site variable. Example --define my_
                               variable=5.
  -o, --output-dir=VALUE     The output directory of the generated website.
                               Default is 'www'
  -i, --input-dir=VALUE      The input directory of the website content to
                               generate from. Default is '.'
      --stacktrace           Shows full stacktrace when an error occurs.
                               Default is false.
  init                       Creates a new website
  new                        Creates a new content for the website from an
                               archetype
  config                     Displays the configuration variables from an
                               existing config or the defaults
  clean                      Cleans temporary folder
  serve                      Builds the website, runs a web server and watches
                               for changes
  build                      Builds the website
Use `lunet --help` for usage.

  -h, --help                 Show this message and exit

      --stacktrace           Shows full stacktrace when an error occurs.
